headline: Proof Card 002: Sovereign Procurement Trust Room
short: GoalOS turns enterprise AI procurement into proof: AGIALPHA coordinates the work, reviewers validate evidence, Proof Cards create trust, and RSI reuses only what proved itself.
posts: GoalOS AGIALPHA Ascension turns AI procurement from a slow trust exercise into a proof-backed workflow. Sponsors fund missions. Builders submit evidence. Reviewers validate. Proof Cards create trust.
Sovereign RSI is simple: no artifact shapes future work until it survives evidence, review, selection, monitoring, and rollback readiness.
AGIALPHA becomes useful when proof work needs coordination: mission rewards, builder bonds, proof bonds, reviewer bonds, credentials, reputation, and future routing.
